features.title: TTY line discipline (termios)
features.notes: ICANON/ECHO/ISIG; ONLCR on output

features.title: write(2)
features.notes: ONLCR in sys_write

features.title: preadv(2)
features.notes: implemented but node uses pread64; thin direct coverage

features.title: mremap(2)
features.notes: in-place grow or MREMAP_MAYMOVE (V8 heap growth)

features.title: munmap(2)
features.notes: stub no-op; bump allocator never frees

features.title: mprotect(2)
features.notes: stub returns 0

features.title: madvise(2)
features.notes: stub returns 0

features.title: ppoll(2)
features.notes: stub returns 0

features.title: socket (AF_INET/INET6)
features.notes: AF_UNIX -> EAFNOSUPPORT

features.title: socketpair(2)
features.notes: ENOSYS — not supported

features.title: ioctl (TIOCGWINSZ/TCGETS)
features.notes: ENOTTY so isatty() is false (V8 init)

features.title: getrandom(2)
features.notes: host Math.random via emscripten_random

features.title: signal syscalls (sigaction/procmask/kill)
features.notes: stubs return 0; handlers never delivered

tests.test_id: code.test.mjs::run() executes a BusyBox command and captures stdout [feat:sdk.code.run]
code.test.mjs::shExec() runs a real sh pipeline [feat:sdk.code.exec]
code.test.mjs::exec() single-quotes argv and runs it through sh [feat:sdk.code.exec]
shell.test.mjs::constructor env seeds the session environment [feat:sdk.shell.session]
terminal.test.mjs::clear builtin emits the terminal reset sequence [feat:sdk.mode.terminal]
terminal.test.mjs::pwd builtin renders the tracked cwd without spawning [feat:sdk.mode.terminal]
terminal.test.mjs::onData streams command output as it is produced [feat:sdk.mode.terminal]
serve.test.mjs::parseHttpResponse parses status line, headers, and body [feat:sdk.serve.http]
serve.test.mjs::startServer rejects when the launch exits before readiness [feat:sdk.serve.http]

features.title: scripting eval + marshal (boa.wasm)
features.notes: boa.wasm engine done; ScriptEngine SDK surface not yet fully wired

tests.test_id: scripting.test.mjs::script eval marshals a JSON result [feat:sdk.scripting.eval]
scripting.test.mjs::registerFunction + defineGlobal drive a long-lived engine [feat:sdk.scripting.eval]

features.title: scripting capability gating
features.notes: capability denial path exists; surface in flux

tests.test_id: scripting.test.mjs::a script with no run grant cannot reach nano.run [feat:sdk.scripting.capability]
scripting.test.mjs::fs:readonly + run grants let a script drive the VM [feat:sdk.scripting.capability]

node.test.mjs::nodeRuntime restores are isolated from each other [feat:sdk.node.runtime]
